description: Deterministic Agent Mail handoff templates for durable RCH proof submissions. The templates are fixture-only, require no live Agent Mail during tests, and never broaden a focused durable receipt into release readiness, workspace health, or live RCH fleet availability.

policy.targeting_rule: Send to the current lane owner, the next explicitly named owner, or the peer blocked by the proof lane. Do not broadcast.

templates.body_template:
Durable RCH proof submitted for `{manifest_lane_id}`.

- submission: `{durable_submission_id}`
- receipt: `{receipt_id_or_pending}`
- source HEAD: `{source_head}`
- command fingerprint: `{command_fingerprint}`
- lifecycle: `{lifecycle_state}`
- terminal classification: `{terminal_classification}`
- first blocker: `{first_blocker_summary}`
- refusal reasons: `{refusal_reason_codes}`
- query: `{query_command}`

Ownership: sender owns this proof lane until it reaches a terminal receipt or an explicit handoff is accepted. Do not cancel it unless the owner asks.

Claim boundary: this is a queued durable submission only. It does not prove release-readiness, workspace-health, live-rch-fleet-availability, or unrelated proof lanes.

Durable RCH proof still running for `{manifest_lane_id}`.

- submission: `{durable_submission_id}`
- receipt: `{receipt_id_or_pending}`
- source HEAD: `{source_head}`
- command fingerprint: `{command_fingerprint}`
- lifecycle: `{lifecycle_state}`
- terminal classification: `{terminal_classification}`
- first blocker: `{first_blocker_summary}`
- refusal reasons: `{refusal_reason_codes}`
- query: `{query_command}`

Ownership: sender owns the active lane. If this blocks a release proof, ask for handoff instead of canceling from another pane.

Claim boundary: running evidence is not terminal evidence. Do not cite it as release-readiness, workspace-health, live-rch-fleet-availability, or unrelated proof-lane proof.

Durable RCH proof is stale for `{manifest_lane_id}`.

- submission: `{durable_submission_id}`
- receipt: `{receipt_id_or_pending}`
- source HEAD: `{source_head}`
- command fingerprint: `{command_fingerprint}`
- lifecycle: `{lifecycle_state}`
- terminal classification: `{terminal_classification}`
- first blocker: `{first_blocker_summary}`
- refusal reasons: `{refusal_reason_codes}`
- query: `{query_command}`

Ownership: sender yields the active slot for a fresh rerun or handoff. Cite the stale receipt only as a blocker/refusal.

Claim boundary: stale evidence is not terminal pass evidence and cannot support release-readiness, workspace-health, live-rch-fleet-availability, or unrelated proof lanes.

Durable RCH proof was canceled or yielded for `{manifest_lane_id}`.

- submission: `{durable_submission_id}`
- receipt: `{receipt_id_or_pending}`
- source HEAD: `{source_head}`
- command fingerprint: `{command_fingerprint}`
- lifecycle: `{lifecycle_state}`
- terminal classification: `{terminal_classification}`
- first blocker: `{first_blocker_summary}`
- refusal reasons: `{refusal_reason_codes}`
- query: `{query_command}`

Ownership: sender releases this lane. A successor must submit a fresh durable proof before citing pass evidence.

Claim boundary: canceled evidence is a coordination receipt only. It does not prove release-readiness, workspace-health, live-rch-fleet-availability, or unrelated proof lanes.

Durable RCH proof passed for `{manifest_lane_id}`.

- submission: `{durable_submission_id}`
- receipt: `{receipt_id_or_pending}`
- source HEAD: `{source_head}`
- command fingerprint: `{command_fingerprint}`
- lifecycle: `{lifecycle_state}`
- terminal classification: `{terminal_classification}`
- first blocker: `{first_blocker_summary}`
- refusal reasons: `{refusal_reason_codes}`
- query: `{query_command}`

Ownership: sender may close the matching narrow bead or hand this receipt to the next named owner.

Claim boundary: cite only the exact manifest lane and claim scope in the receipt. This does not prove release-readiness, workspace-health, live-rch-fleet-availability, or unrelated proof lanes.

Durable RCH proof failed for `{manifest_lane_id}`.

- submission: `{durable_submission_id}`
- receipt: `{receipt_id_or_pending}`
- source HEAD: `{source_head}`
- command fingerprint: `{command_fingerprint}`
- lifecycle: `{lifecycle_state}`
- terminal classification: `{terminal_classification}`
- first blocker: `{first_blocker_summary}`
- refusal reasons: `{refusal_reason_codes}`
- query: `{query_command}`

Ownership: sender owns the first blocker until explicitly handing it off or reopening the lane for a narrower owner.

Claim boundary: failed proof is blocker evidence only. It does not prove release-readiness, workspace-health, live-rch-fleet-availability, or unrelated proof lanes.

Durable RCH proof handoff requested for `{manifest_lane_id}`.

- submission: `{durable_submission_id}`
- receipt: `{receipt_id_or_pending}`
- source HEAD: `{source_head}`
- command fingerprint: `{command_fingerprint}`
- lifecycle: `{lifecycle_state}`
- terminal classification: `{terminal_classification}`
- first blocker: `{first_blocker_summary}`
- refusal reasons: `{refusal_reason_codes}`
- query: `{query_command}`

Ownership: next named agent should acknowledge before taking cancellation or closeout action. Until then, sender remains the owner.

Claim boundary: handoff text is coordination metadata, not proof. It does not prove release-readiness, workspace-health, live-rch-fleet-availability, or unrelated proof lanes.

golden_markdown:
| template_id | lifecycle_state | proof_evidence_status | may_claim_green_proof | operator_action |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| canceled-yielded-proof-lane | terminal_canceled | blocked | false | fresh-submit-required |
| handoff-to-next-agent | handoff | rerun-required | false | wait-for-ack-before-transfer |
| running-proof-lane | running | rerun-required | false | wait-or-request-handoff |
| stale-proof-lane | terminal_stale | stale-evidence | false | rerun-or-handoff |
| submitted-proof-lane | queued | rerun-required | false | wait-or-coordinate |
| terminal-fail-proof-lane | terminal_fail | blocked | false | fix-first-blocker-or-handoff |
| terminal-pass-proof-lane | terminal_pass | fresh-rch-pass | true | cite-exact-lane-only |
